reviews.review_description:
Incinerate, freeze, and electrocute your way through hordes of fantasy monsters and boss battles, creating unique and interesting builds with extensive skill trees, spell loadouts and loads of varied loot.

There's plenty of fun to experience already and much much more to come.

Give this small team who have genuine care and appreciation for everyone's support and feedback some love and give this game a try today!

Hello, developers.
I have a very important question: will the persistent internet connection be retained after the game's release? If this is a single-player game, I would like you to disable the persistent internet connection after release, as it drains the Quest's battery quickly.
Unfortunately, this is really bothering me. I can't launch the game offline.
I really want to play offline.

reviews.review_title: I AM MAGICIAN HEAR ME ROAR!!!
reviews.review_description: This game is awesome.  The hand tracking spell casting is literally so F’ing cool.  Shooting the fire and lightening out of your fingertips and conjuring the spells is just top notch.  You can tell the game has deep progression/upgrade system and you can choose your path depending on your preference of how you most like to deal your carnage to the enemies.  The team did an awesome job of bringing something cool, fresh and unique to the table here.  Singing the praises of this game that are well deserved and excited for the updates.  Also, really like how you guys laid out your plan to final release that is a cool idea and kudos to you for actually sharing with us what is next and giving tentative dates for when we can expect it.  Thank you for a great game and recommending to friends.

developer_response.body: Thanks SicilianEmpire for the endorsement! We are glad you loved the game and the best is yet to come!

reviews.review_description: Love the concept, top tier hand tracking game and finally a vr game with lots of loot!

I had a lot of fun creating spells and progressing through a world that feels straight out of Lord of the Rings. You need to think fast and craft the right spell depending on your enemies, which adds a great layer of challenge and strategy. There are tons of options for spell combinations and tactical approaches.

Even though it’s still in Early Access, Tower of Titans already offers very advanced game mechanics. I also love that players can choose between hand tracking or controllers, giving full flexibility in how you cast your magic.

If you’ve ever wanted to feel like Harry Potter in a Gandalf-style environment, don’t hesitate — this game has enough content, creativity, and fun to keep you entertained and hooked for a long time. A solid, magical experience all around.

I had the fortune of getting to try out Tower of Titans back in June at AWE. I was blown away by the idea of casting spells using hand tracking. Over the last few months, I had the fortune to play since the early build. The dev's at Chaossic Studio have really hit the head on the nail in terms of hand tracking. It took me weeks before I picked up my Quest controllers again. As the dev's continue to work on the game. It will only get better. I would highly recommend this game for those that want to feel like Dr. Strange in VR.

reviews.review_title: Mastering magic to challenge the Titans
reviews.review_description: This is one of the best wizard experiences in VR. The pacing is great you won’t feel like you have no chance against a tide of enemies. The visuals are outstanding and the system has depth so you feel like you’re learning the arcane arts. If you want to feel like a mage mastering the craft of magic this is the game for you.

I have been playing this game for a few weeks now this game is absolutely amazing. You will not be disappointed. It is full of action and you will love it. I have been creating videos on the offer for three years and this is one of my favorite games

This has all the right tools to be amazing, equipment and skill selection make for great strategic development, the spells so far are great, and the pace of combat is engaging, but the developers will need to address some key things for success I think. The scroll on the side interferes with combat, the system frequently thinks your grabbing it while you're trying to cast. The shield interferes with your opposite hand when casting. And the push spell is as unreliable as it is essential. If these things are addressed, i see this game killing the charts.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the thoughtful feedback and encouragement! We're glad you're enjoying the combat pace and spell variety. For the Shield, just a heads‑up, once it’s activated, you can move it freely with your left arm without keeping it fixed in front. We’ve also reached out to you directly with a few questions to better understand the other points you mentioned. Thanks again for helping us make the game even better!

reviews.review_description: I've been playing this game since beta testing. The bare hand gesture  casting magic defeats the enemy hordes. At first only the basic fireball and shield magic, but as you go on, you can get variety magic spells like wide-area thunder magic and level-up with acquired items. You need to quickly create the proper magic spells according to the enemies that appear, but it's not easy because the hand gestures are not well trained at first. Hand gesture recognition without controllers works pretty well, but sometimes it's difficult because it doesn't move as you think when you're in a hurry. When succeeded in large magic casting, it is a cheerful time for defeating large hordes of enemies at once. It may not be perfect as early access yet, but it is expected to be developed into a exciting fast magic caster game.

it feels like an endless tutorial. Is there more coming up than leveling and using using spells against hordes? A story mode? pvp? teamplay? 
Because otherwise it becomes a bit boring. 
i really appreciate the idea. Just bring it into something better than hack and slack. But this has high potential!

developer_response.body: Hi FaBLN73! Have you made it pass the 3rd dungeon into The Space Between? The game really opens up after that and you can make many choices towards how you develop your character. The awesome fight with Rajel, the Infernal Titan also awaits you. We will also be releasing the epic story in future Early Access updates!

reviews.review_description: Brilliant game. The only trouble is there is no moving around .I do hope the devs put movement into the game it would make a big difference
